contradictions.claim_text: Only specialized medical Luxembourgish program in Luxembourg; no competitor exists.
contradictions.resolution: Drop the uniqueness claim. Public Luxembourg providers already offer Luxembourgish and professional language training, including healthcare-oriented language positioning.
contradictions.why_it_matters: The market-gap hook is not defensible and would misstate the competitive landscape.

falsification_searches.result: No credible exclusive program signal survived; substitutes exist in Luxembourgish professional language training.

falsification_searches.query: "Luxembourgish" "medical and healthcare sector" language training Luxembourg
falsification_searches.result: Public provider pages showed healthcare-oriented language training positioning.
Public Luxembourg providers offer Luxembourgish courses and business/professional language services.
